Day three of the Paris Olympics gave no shortage of stunning performances, crushing misses, and some surprising delays, as the world芒聙聶s best athletes competed for the coveted medals on the world stage.

China's Lian Junjie and Yang Hao compete in the men's synchronized 10m platform diving final at the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on July 29, 2024. PHOTO: SEBASTIEN BOZON / AFP

China芒聙聶s Lian Junjie and Yang Hao were awarded Olympic gold medals after winning the men芒聙聶s synchronized 10m platform diving at the Paris Olympics on Monday, July 29, 2024.

Silver medallist China芒聙聶s Xu Jiayu poses with his medal after the men芒聙聶s 100m backstroke swimming event during the Paris 2024 Olympic Games 
PHOTO: JONATHAN NACKSTRAND / AFP

China芒聙聶s Xu Jiayu won silver in the men芒聙聶s 100M backstroke final, while players from Team China took the silver medal in the men芒聙聶s team gymnastics final on Monday. Japan won the gold while the U.S. claimed the bronze, ending the squad芒聙聶s 16-year Olympic medal drought.

Australia芒聙聶s Mollie O芒聙聶Callaghan claimed the gold in the women芒聙聶s 200-meter freestyle. Canadian teenager Summer McIntosh claimed her first gold medal in the women芒聙聶s 400-meter individual medley.

South Africa received its first gold of the Paris Olympics on Monday as Tatjana Smith won the woman芒聙聶s 100-meter breaststroke title, with China芒聙聶s world champion Tang Qianting winning the silver medal, and Ireland芒聙聶s Mona McSharry taking the bronze.

Cheung Ka Long from Hong Kong, China, celebrates after winning against Italy芒聙聶s Filippo Macchi in the men芒聙聶s foil individual gold medal bout during the Paris 2024 Olympic Games. PHOTO: FABRICE COFFRINI / AFP

Defending champion Cheung Ka-long of Hong Kong, China, retained his title in men芒聙聶s foil, beating first-time Olympian Filippo Macchi of Italy 15-14 in a disputed bout.

China芒聙聶s Yang Junxuan placed fifth in the women芒聙聶s 200-meter freestyle final.

China芒聙聶s Wang Xueer and Wan Letian failed to advance to the medal event with a semifinal time of 59.89聽 and 100.06 respectively in the women芒聙聶s 100-meter backstroke semifinals.

Ukraine claimed its first medal of the Games on Monday in the women芒聙聶s sabre competition, as Olga Kharlan won bronze for the country, rallying from a six-point deficit to beat Choi Sebin of South Korea.

Manon Apithy-Brunet made history as the first French fencer to win an Olympic title in women芒聙聶s saber, taking the silver on Monday.

Japan芒聙聶s Yuto Horigome competes in the men芒聙聶s street skateboarding final during the Paris 2024 Olympic Games in Paris on July 29, 2024. PHOTO: ODD ANDERSEN / AFP

Japan芒聙聶s Yuto Horigome retained his Olympic men芒聙聶s street skateboarding title, landing the highest-scoring trick in the final round of Monday芒聙聶s competition.聽American Jagger Eaton took the silver, with another U.S. skateboarder Nyjah Huston claiming the bronze.

Christa Deguchi won the women芒聙聶s under 57kg gold medal on Monday, the first-ever Olympic judo title for Canada.

Hidayat Heydarov of Azerbaijan took home gold in the men芒聙聶s under 73kg final at the Paris Games.

China advanced with a 3-2 victory in the women芒聙聶s volleyball preliminary round, over its first opponent the U.S. on Monday.聽 The team will now gear up to play the host nation France.

China芒聙聶s Wang Chuqin (L) and China芒聙聶s Sun Yingsha (R) play a return to South Korea芒聙聶s Lim Jonghoon and South Korea芒聙聶s Shin Yubin during their mixed table tennis doubles semifinals at the Paris 2024 Olympic Games on July 29, 2024. PHOTO: JUNG YEON-JE / AFP

China芒聙聶s Wang Chuqin and Sun Yingsha secured a 4-2 victory over Lim Jong-hoon and Shin Yu-bin of South Korea in the table tennis mixed doubles semifinals on Monday. They will advance to play Ri Jong-sik and Kim Kum-yong of DPRK in the finals.

Olympics surfing was called off in Tahiti after the men芒聙聶s third round on Monday, as the arrival of a storm put an end to the competition for the day.

Organizers of the Games also canceled swimming training in the River Seine on Monday, as they waited to learn if pollution levels will fall low enough to hold the men芒聙聶s triathlon in the river on Tuesday.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.

title: Stunning performances on third day of Paris Olympics - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: Day three of the Paris Olympics gave no shortage of stunning performances, crushing misses, and some surprising delays, as the world芒聙聶s best athletes competed for the coveted medals on the world stage.
